events.headline: EIA FORECASTS LOWER OIL PRICES IN 2026 AND 2027 DUE TO PERSISTENT STOCK BUILDS

events.headline: U.S. NATURAL GAS PRODUCTION TO REACH RECORD HIGHS IN 2026 AND 2027
